text: Hey everyone! In this video I will be teaching you how to do a kneeling squat.
So you're going to start off in a kneeling position on your knees with your toes
untucked and then you're just going to drop your hips and have a seat right on
the bottom of your feet. Now to do this motion you're just simply going to lift
up your top half of your body here, push your hips forward, squeeze your glutes,
tighten your tummy and then come back down. That's one repetition.
Alright now it's your turn. Get to those kneeling squats.
